headline: Tech's worst week in a year — AI momentum breaks
detail: AI-driven momentum names sold off hard across the board, hitting chip and software names especially. This is the core driver of your AVGO and PLTR losses and puts pressure on your entire tech-heavy book.

headline: U.S. strikes Iran after ceasefire violation
detail: Geopolitical escalation in the Strait of Hormuz triggers risk-off sentiment and energy supply fears. Broad market fear readings rise, which is bad for margin accounts — a sudden spike down can blow through stops fast.

headline: SpaceX bonds flash warning as AI frenzy cools
detail: Investors are pumping the brakes on SpaceX credit, which directly concerns your SPCX and SPAL positions. Combined with SPAL's leverage decay, this is a high-alert situation for both SpaceX names.

headline: Fed's Kashkari projects one rate hike this year
detail: A rate hike — not a cut — is a direct valuation headwind for high-multiple growth and AI names. This shifts the macro backdrop more negative for virtually everything in your portfolio.
